name: Click To Raffle.Com, Inc.
summary: Click to Raffle.com, Inc. does not have significant operations. It intends to merge or acquire a company engaged in Internet raffle activities. The company was founded in 2004. It was formerly known as A Classified Ad, Inc. and changed its name to Click to Raffle.com, Inc. in 2005. Click to Raffle.com is based in Jupiter, Florida. Click To Raffle.Com, Inc. operates independently of Green Energy Group, Inc. as of June 04, 2004.
